roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: APD MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT AND REPORT REGARDING PROGRAM/12XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BYDEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 12-22-21/X: BAIL SET AT $1500/

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH5 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 33D/CTS 33/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/RESTV/X:PURSUANT HARVEY WAIVER, ANY OUTSTANDING TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM CRT #2515821 & #19020200 ARE TRANSFERRED TO THIS CASE/X:ATTEND 10 CLASSES OF COUNSELING THRU PTD EITHERTHROUGH ANGER  MANAGEMENT OR THINKING FOR A CHANGE/SA1:JORDAN RUIZ-MUNOZ/SA2:2300 - 16TH ST, SF AND 1300 BUSH ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/EMTERM/VD:12-03-21 TRIAL DATE/DISM3/SCC1/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION  UNIT FOR DETERMINATIONOF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:12-13-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN  DEPARTMENT 30 & PROG RPT RE PROGRAM/DOPU:NEG RPT/

/CAL GLOBAL DISPOSITION/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINTO ADD COUNT #3 AS  A PC 242, COUNT #4 AS A PC 490,2(A) AND COUNT #5 AS APC 490,2(A), ALL COUNTS ARE MISDEMEANORS, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: #3, #4 AND#5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:12-17-21/TE:2 WEEKS/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DOPC/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITH FOR GLOBAL DISPO/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TORELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 10-18-21 IN DEPT, 22 IS CONFIRMED/CONTD: TRAILING 19020200/DOP/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING & ACM ELIG REPORT/WITEXCL DEFENSE/INVOFF OFFICERWHEELER/WIT SWORN:OFFICER MICHAEL FYE, S,F,P,D,/EXHMA:DEFENSE EXHIBIT #A- 1 PAGE OF PHOTOS (CONTAINING 4 PHOTOS) ONLY APPLIES TO PHOTO ON TOP LEFT;PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT #1 - 1 PAGE OF PHOTOS (CONTAINING 4 PHOTOS) ONLY APPLIESTO THE OTHER 3 PHOTOS AS INTRODUCED BY DEFENSE EXHIBIT #A/X: THE PEOPLE'SORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT #3, PC 211, A FELONY, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /X:COURT CORRECTS COUNT #1 TO INDICATE IT AS PC 663,211, A FELONY, 2ND DEGREE/HTA1:#1 & #3/CTORD: MISDEMEANOR COUNT#2 CERTIFIED//BAIL:50,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OFCOURT,/CONTD:10-12-21 FOR AN ACM ELIG REPORT/CONTD:10-18-21 IN DEPT, 22FOR ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:10-05-21/X: THE30TH LAST DAY IS 11-03-21 AND THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 11-22-21/BAIL:50,000/SA1: JORDAN RUIZ MUNOZ/SA2: 2300 6TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO,CA/SAORD/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOPC/
